title: Gyufise 36Pcs Baby Shower Cupcake Toppers Baby Cupcake Toppers Gold Woodland Jungle Safari Theme Cupcakes Decor Gender Reveal Cake Topper Boy Girl Birthday Party Green Leaf Cake Decorations
features: -Package included: 36Pcs Baby Shower Cupcake Toppers. Comes with assembled, so you can insert into your cake directly, which make your cake more interesting.

-Premium Material: These Baby Shower Cupcake Toppers are made of high quality 300g card stock and food-grade toothpick, very safe to put them on cakes, cupcakes, ice cream, fruits, pie, dessert, cheese or any dish and food appetizer you want to decorate Baby Shower Party decorations.

-Baby Shower Cupcake Toppers are so cute and good for sweet baby theme party, tropical palm leaves theme party, hawaiian luau leaves theme party, baby shower theme party, birthday party cupcake decorations. They can make your cupcake more attractive and bring the fun to your party. You can also apply them for ice cream, fruits, cookies and other desserts.
-Widely Application: Unique personalized propose Koala theme design. Best party cake decor which can be used at safari animal Party Decorations, and other similar theme parties.

-Tips: These cupcake toppers are designed for single-sided, the backside is plain white. Only for decoration purposes, this is not edible and please do NOT use it in oven or microwave. Our highest priority is your satisfaction.If you are not absolutely thrilled with the product, we'll give you a full refund!
description: Features - Package: Pack of 36Pcs. Size: W 2inch x H 4.3inch / W 5cm x H 11cm(Include Stick).
